name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 12 Nov 2025
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In this release, we have added some new enhancements to our Neto Control Panel sections."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"INVITE USERS VIA MAROPOST IDENTITY"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Neto admins can now send invites to new and existing staff members to access their Neto Control Panel accounts via "},{"text":"Maropost Identity","bold":true},{"text":". Staff members will receive invite emails from their admins asking them to create a new Maropost Identity account if they haven’t had one previously. Else, they can link their current Maropost Identity account with their Neto Control Panel account."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Once the accounts get linked, the staff users' identity status gets updated in the "},{"text":"Staff User","bold":true},{"text":" section."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/YEBH4Z4H7SMR/staff2.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/YEBH4Z4H7SMR/staff2.png","name":"staff2.png","type":"image/png","size":236763,"width":2848,"height":1320,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FYEBH4Z4H7SMR%2Fstaff2.png","active":true,"mediaID":1415,"dateInserted":"2025-11-12T06:03:41+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To understand how to invite staff users and get their Neto accounts linked, read our "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2345-invite-users-to-neto-control-panel","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Invite Users to Neto Control Panel","bold":true}]},{"text":" article."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"ORDER INFORMATION POP-UP ENHANCEMENT"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can now view key metrics of your order by hovering over its order status. Upon doing so, an order information pop-up appears, displaying details such as its billing report, current status, order update records, status history, and more. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This feature is available on the \""},{"text":"Legacy","bold":true},{"text":"\" order list page and can be dismissed by clicking outside the pop-up. The hover-to-reveal design guarantees the pop-up appears only by choice, not by accident, delivering a seamless, non-intrusive user experience."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/FUB40VCDZFKI/ordlabel9.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/FUB40VCDZFKI/ordlabel9.png","name":"ordlabel9.png","type":"image/png","size":152275,"width":1365,"height":424,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FFUB40VCDZFKI%2Fordlabel9.png","active":true,"mediaID":1416,"dateInserted":"2025-11-12T06:04:10+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
